news.headline: HOMEE AI showcases Spatial Intelligence at NVIDIA GTC 2025, revolutionizing human-space interaction. Asia-based company forefront in reshaping industries.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, as of March 13, 2025, HOMEE AI is leading the way in transforming industries with the help of AI. Focusing on Spatial Intelligence, this company based in Asia is revolutionizing our engagement with physical spaces through Xplorer. AI is rapidly reshaping various sectors, and HOMEE AI is a key player in this evolution.

news.headline: Clearstead Advisor, LLC appoints Robert "Bob" Thornton as Executive Chairman and Chairman of Board, bringing 30+ years experience.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, Clearstead Advisors, LLC disclosed that Robert "Bob" Thornton has been chosen to serve as the Executive Chairman and Chairman of the Board. Thornton brings over three decades of expertise in wealth management, mergers and acquisitions, and advisory services to this leadership role. The appointment of Thornton is indicative of Clearstead's focus on leveraging his extensive experience to guide the company forward.

news.headline: Stagwell unveils draft picks for SPORT BEACH 2025, with new and returning athletes, and brand partners. Convo-inspiring programming.
news.summary: An array of discussions on various aspects of sports will be the focus of the programming scheduled for this year. The multinational company Stagwell revealed its plans on March 13, 2025, in New York and Austin, Texas. Stagwell, listed on NASDAQ as STGW, is known for its innovative approach to marketing. The announcement highlighted the addition of a fresh group of athletes and brand collaborators to their lineup.

news.headline: Human Computer secures $5.7M in seed funding led by Makers Fund, bringing total funding to $7.7M. New advisor and board member announced.
news.summary: A game studio named Human Computer, known for its collaborative creativity, has successfully raised $5.7 million in a seed funding round. The investment was led by Makers Fund, with contributions from a16z and former Airbnb COO Belinda Johnson. This latest round of funding brings the total amount raised by the company to $7.7 million. Tyler Matheson from Makers Fund will now join the board, and Sam Rosenthal, founder of The Game Band, has been appointed as the first advisor to Human Computer. The studio was established by industry veterans Alex Schleifer and Eliot Garcia Weisberg.

news.headline: Witkoff meeting with Putin expected to be under way imminently, according to a source briefed on the matter.
Madison Liquidators partners with Holland Bar Stools for premium furniture. Exciting venture in office and game room realm.
news.summary: Madison Liquidators, based in Madison, Wisconsin, revealed on March 13, 2025, a notable development in partnering with Holland Bar Stools, a well-known producer of top-tier bar stools, tables, outdoor furniture, and premium game room accessories. This collaboration aligns two prominent entities in the industry, enhancing the range and quality of offerings available to customers. This partnership signifies a significant step forward for Madison Liquidators, known for delivering high-quality office furniture and accessories.

news.headline: Four Nord Anglia Education schools rank among world's best in 2025 Spear's Schools Index. Top 100 list for private schools.
news.summary: In London on March 13, 2025, four prominent Nord Anglia Education schools have reaffirmed their position among the top private schools globally, according to the esteemed 2025 Spear's Schools Index. This index is considered a premier guide to the world's best 100 schools.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls on new Trump tariff threats, impacting Adobe, Nvidia, Tesla. Stock market sees sell-off.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones experienced a decline following President Donald Trump's announcement of potential additional tariffs. This news led to a sell-off in the stock market, particularly affecting Nvidia and Tesla. Adobe, Nvidia, and Tesla all saw a decrease in their stock prices. The situation reflects the ongoing impact of trade tensions on the financial market.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 400 points due to Trump tariff threat. Meta weak. Gold miners rise. Home Depot falls. Nasdaq hit hard.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced significant losses as the Nasdaq and other indexes were heavily impacted. Despite a flatlining of U.S. wholesale prices in February, Meta faced continued weakness. Home Depot saw a decline in its stock, while there was an advance for gold miners. The Dow Jones plummeted by 400 points due to a new tariff threat from President Trump. Additionally, Meta Platforms triggered a sell rule. This information was provided on Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.

news.headline: IBM and Basque Govt to install Europe's first IBM Quantum System Two in Spain with 156-qubit processor by end of 2025.
news.summary: The upcoming IBM Quantum System Two will utilize a robust 156-qubit IBM Quantum Heron processor, designed for utility-scale operations. The system is set to be installed at the IBM-Euskadi Quantum Computational Center by the conclusion of 2025. Stakeholders within the center have expressed their intentions...

news.headline: Inventor creates vehicle safety product after tragic accident, aims to shatter side window automatically.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, a tragic vehicle accident resulted in the loss of a community patriarch. The victim, unable to escape after his truck entered a retention pond, sparked a discussion about the need for automatic window shattering devices in vehicles. This incident underscores the importance of safety measures as it claimed the life of one individual.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts Boeing's production will increase by 2025. Company delivered 44 planes in February, surpassing 2024 numbers. $213 price forecast.
news.summary: Analyst Noah Poponak from Goldman Sachs expects Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) to reach $213 as per his Buy rating. The monthly update revealed that in February, Boeing delivered a total of 44 airplanes, exceeding the numbers seen early in 2024. Among them, 32 were from the 737 family built in Renton, with 31 being 737 MAX jets. Additionally, the company secured 13 new gross orders for the 737 MAX during the same month. The analyst pointed out positive trends in new aircraft orders.

news.headline: Qalby Etmaan introduces 'Clay Donation Boxes' to promote sustainability and Emirati craftsmanship as part of Year of Community.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, the Qalby Etmaan program introduced the 'Clay Donation Boxes' initiative for its eighth season as part of the country's "Year of Community" initiative. Under the visionary leadership of the United Arab Emirates, this program aims to promote community engagement.

news.headline: Changpeng Zhao refutes Binance.US deal rumors and defends Trump. Denies seeking pardon for role in Binance. #ChangpengZhao #Binance #Trump
news.summary: Changpeng Zhao, the former CEO of Binance, has refuted claims from a Wall Street Journal report suggesting he was pursuing a federal pardon from US President Donald Trump. In a post on March 13, Zhao stated he had no involvement in discussions regarding a business deal between the Trump family and Binance.US. He also denied seeking a pardon from Trump that would potentially allow him to take on a role at Binance. Zhao emphasized that while no felon would reject a pardon, he believes the article is an attempt to criticize the President and the crypto industry. He expressed concerns about the lingering effects of the previous administration's stance on cryptocurrencies. Zhao's comments were in response to the aforementioned report published on March 13 by the Wall Street Journal. Further updates on this matter will be provided as more information becomes available.

news.headline: KV Capital introduces new fund for Canadian investors, targeting 14%-18% annual returns in Building Products Strategy.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, KV Capital introduced the establishment of KV Building Products Access Fund LP. This closed-end fund grants eligible and accredited Canadian investors the opportunity to invest in collaboration with KV and its institutional partners in the firm’s Building Products Strategy. The fund aims to achieve annual returns ranging from 14% to 18% from the private equity portfolio within the strategy. The Access Fund represents a recent addition to the Building Products Strategy, focusing on growth within the housing construction sector.

news.headline: MikeWorldWide acquires Berk Communications to form largest sports practice in nation, adding expertise in entertainment/lifestyle PR. Berk to operate independently with Mike's resources.
news.summary: A merger has formed the largest sports practice in the nation, bringing expertise in entertainment and lifestyle PR. Berk will remain an independent brand but will now have access to Mike's wide range of integrated resources and AI tools. The merger was announced in New York on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Post-Covid workdays are shorter, yet more productive. -Bloomberg
BrickImaging in Denver now selling Stayntech® - their exclusive brick stain - after 50 years.
news.summary: Headquartered in the Denver metropolitan area, BrickImaging® has unveiled its proprietary masonry stain Stayntech® for sale to the public. Originally utilized exclusively by BrickImaging for almost five decades, Stayntech is now accessible for purchase. The commercial-grade Stayntech masonry stains from BrickImaging have brought a modern and revitalized look to various structures, including office buildings, apartment complexes, hospitals, government buildings, and shopping centers. Stayntech marks the first masonry staining firm in North America and is now offering its revolutionary product to a wider audience.

news.headline: 2024 State of the Market Report finds PJM wholesale electricity markets remain competitive with positive results.
news.summary: The PJM Interconnection's wholesale electric energy market in EAGLEVILLE, Pa. has been reported to have had a competitive performance in 2024, as per the recently released 2024 State of the Market Report for PJM by Monitoring Analytics, LLC. The report highlights significant findings indicating that the market operated competitively with key figures showing promising outcomes.

news.headline: EU Trade Commissioner to have call with US counterpart on Friday.
EC Pres. von der Leyen: The EU will defend its interests on tariffs.
EC Pres. von der Leyen: We're open to negotiations with the US on tariffs.
Investors remain pessimistic, as revealed by one survey.
Public opposes expanding Presidential power over independent agencies, blocking federal spending, replacing civil servants. 65-69% against in bipartisan majority.
news.summary: In College Park, Maryland, a recent survey conducted by the Program for Public Consultation discovered widespread disapproval from the public regarding the discussion on increasing Presidential power. The survey revealed that significant majorities ranging from 65% to 69%, with bipartisan agreement in most cases, are against the expansion of Presidential authority. This suggests a strong sentiment among the public against granting more power to the President.

news.headline: Paslay Group to provide executive program management services to assist JWA with Capital Improvement Program at John Wayne Airport.
news.summary: Santa Ana, California - On March 13, 2025, Paslay Group, the top airport consultancy in the country, revealed an increased involvement at John Wayne Airport (JWA) in Orange County. This development aims to support airport and county officials in executing JWA's Capital Improvement Program (CIP), a long-term project focused on enhancing facilities and operations. This expanded engagement signifies Paslay Group's commitment to aiding JWA in meeting its strategic goals, improving passenger experience, and ensuring sustained growth.

news.headline: Donatella Versace resigns as creative chief after leading for 28 years.
Latest data on sector and industry performance, updated daily with key numbers.
Tivoli Lighting introduces 3D Dual Bend Tape for flexibility in both vertical and horizontal applications, boasting 97+ CRI.
news.summary: Based in Irvine, California, Tivoli Lighting, a pioneer in linear lighting for over five decades, has launched 3D Dual Bend Tape™, a revolutionary product that provides unparalleled versatility in both vertical and horizontal orientations. This innovative tape can be flexed seamlessly in all directions, making it perfect for intricate urban extrusion concepts. The 3D Dual Bend Tape boasts impressive specifications, including high efficacy and an excellent Color Rendering Index (CRI) of 97+, ensuring precise color representation with minimal bin tolerance according to the rigorous 1.5 Step McAdam Ellipse standard.

news.headline: Solana (SOL) may dip below $100 following death cross on 1-day chart hinting at 30% drop from $125 support level. Bulls eye $125 defense to prevent further decline to $80.
news.summary: Solana (SOL) recently completed a "death cross," signaling a potential sell-off below $100 for the first time since February 2024. The death cross occurred between the 50-day and 200-day moving averages, leading to a 17% drop in prices from $137 to $122. Previous death crosses in SOL's history have resulted in significant corrections, with the first in 2022 causing a 90% collapse. Currently, SOL traders aim to defend the $125 support level, with a bullish reversal requiring a hold between $125 and $110. A weekly close below $125 could lead to a further decline towards $80, representing a 30% correction. However, there are bullish divergences on the 1-day and 4-hour charts that could potentially push prices higher above $125, avoiding a drop below $100 and establishing a bottom at $112. Overall, the article emphasizes the importance of conducting personal research and analysis before making investment decisions.

news.headline: Donald Trump urged to appoint special envoy to China - FT
Werner Enterprises receives Transport Topics Sustainability Pathfinder Award for 2024, sharing honor with IMC Logistics.
news.summary: Werner Enterprises, Inc., a leading transportation and logistics provider listed on the Nasdaq under WERN, based in Omaha, Nebraska, has been honored with the Transport Topics Sustainability Pathfinder Award for its ongoing commitment to sustainability in the transportation sector. This year, the company was one of the two recipients of this prestigious award, alongside IMC Logistics. Introduced in 2024, this award highlights organizations that demonstrate exceptional efforts in advocating for environmental stewardship and incorporating pioneering sustainable practices.

news.headline: US online grocery market to reach $715.54 billion by 2033, from $183.26 billion in 2024, with 16.34% CAGR. Key players: Tesco, Walmart, Instacart, Kroger.
news.summary: A report on the United States Online Grocery Market predicts significant growth, with the market expected to increase from US$ 183.26 Billion in 2024 to US$ 715.54 Billion by 2033. The compound annual growth rate for this market is projected at 16.34% from 2025 to 2033. Factors attributing to this growth include increasing consumer demand for convenience and advancements in technology. This information was recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.

news.headline: Highmark Health revenue up by 9% to $29.4 billion, $50 million net income by end 2024 despite industry challenges.
news.summary: Highmark Health Plans disclosed a decline in operating performance while tackling rising medical trend costs across the industry. Conversely, Allegheny Health Network showcased a 9% increase in total revenue and enhanced operating performance compared to the previous year. This data was made public in Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Conexon Connect completes 10th fiber network in 4 years; continues nationwide rural expansion.
news.summary: In rural America, the reach of Conexon's partner network from Sac Osage Electric Cooperative in Missouri has recently been completed, further expanding its nationwide coverage. Conexon Connect, an ISP created for rural areas, is spearheading this initiative. This expansion is a significant milestone for the company and will benefit a large number of residents in remote regions. The completion of the network in Missouri highlights the efforts to bridge the digital divide, especially in underserved areas. The impact of this expansion is expected to enhance internet access for thousands of residents in rural communities, marking a positive step towards greater connectivity in the region.

news.headline: U.S. Postal Service debuts new Freshwater Fishing Lures stamps featuring five designs at Wonders of Wildlife Museum in Springfield.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Springfield, Missouri, the U.S. Postal Service unveiled Freshwater Fishing Lures stamps at Johnny Morris' Wonders of Wildlife National Museum and Aquarium. This special stamp collection features close-up photographs of five well-known fishing lure designs.

news.headline: Accrete Government received $15 million funding increase for Argus platform from AFWERX for Program Year 2025.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on March 13, 2025, Accrete Government, a branch of Accrete, Inc. specializing in AI solutions, has been granted a $15 million Strategic Funding Increase (STRATFI) for Program Year 2025 by AFWERX, the Department of the Air Force's innovation division.

news.headline: Sony develops new display system with RGB control for LED backlights, enhancing color reproduction and brightness. (Characters: 110)
news.summary: Sony Electronics Inc. revealed their latest innovation on March 13, 2025, aiming to elevate film production and home cinema viewing. The technology promises a wider color gamut and increased brightness, offering enhanced color accuracy and nuanced shading throughout the entire brightness spectrum. This development marks a significant step towards delivering a more immersive cinematic experience at home.

news.headline: JLL Income Property Trust declares 53rd consecutive quarterly dividend, with $6.6 billion in investments.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, JLL Income Property Trust, a daily NAV REIT managed by institutions (NASDAQ: ZIPTAX; ZIPTMX; ZIPIAX; ZIPIMX), revealed that its portfolio holds about $6.6 billion in equity and debt investments. The Board of Directors declared a significant action on March 12, 2024.

news.headline: Inventor from Myrtle Beach introduces SAFE WIPE insecticide product (CSK-679) as alternative to aerosols.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Myrtle Beach, S.C., unveiled the SAFE WIPE, a new solution for insect control. The inventor aimed to provide a quick, easy, and safe method to eliminate pests without the use of aerosols that may leave harmful residue. This innovation introduces an alternative approach to pest management.

news.headline: Warrior Met Coal, Inc. creates a new webpage for Blue Creek project updates, aiming at completion in 15 months. #HCC
news.summary: Based in Brookwood, Alabama, Warrior Met Coal, Inc. (NYSE:HCC) has introduced a dedicated webpage for the Blue Creek project. This initiative aims to keep stakeholders informed about the project's advancement as it approaches finalization. Over the next fifteen months, the webpage will feature regular updates through investor presentations, press releases, visuals, and videos showcasing key milestones and progress. Those interested can access the Blue Creek webpage on the company's website.

news.headline: US taxpayers see tax refunds as crucial due to cost of living crisis: Younger gens, more trusting of AI, file early for basic expenses.
news.summary: Results from a Trustpilot survey unlock insights into a noticeable generational gap among taxpayers: the younger demographic tends to file their taxes early, utilize their refunds for essential expenses, and demonstrate a higher inclination towards entrusting artificial intelligence with their filings. The survey, conducted in New York, captured compelling data points highlighting these trends. This divergence in behavior showcases the evolving attitudes towards tax-related practices and technology adoption, with key numbers underlining the disparity among different age groups.

news.headline: GB Labs presents intelligent cloud storage and enterprise NAS at NAB Show 2025, booth SL5705. Leader in media storage.
news.summary: Valencia, California - On March 13, 2025, GB Labs, a top provider of centralized media storage solutions, is set to present its production cloud storage system and enterprise on-prem shared storage at NAB Show 2025, booth SL5705 in South Hall Lower. The company's innovative production offerings will be highlighted during the event.

news.headline: OpenTeams partners with Quansight to provide open source AI solutions for enterprises, allowing them to own their AI.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, OpenTeams, a prominent provider of customized open source artificial intelligence (AI) solutions safeguarding proprietary data for businesses to retain ownership of their AI technologies, recently disclosed a significant development. The company has engaged in a strategic share swap and asset purchase deal with Quansight, a firm specializing in data, science, and engineering services. Quansight addresses intricate data challenges through the utilization of open source software as the basis for AI and machine learning applications. This new partnership agreement is aimed at enhancing collaboration between the two firms.

news.headline: Mortgage rates unchanged; 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.65%.
news.summary: Today, Freddie Mac, a company trading under the ticker symbol FMCC, published the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®) on March 13, 2025. The survey revealed that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) currently stands at 6.65%.

news.headline: Acumatica to showcase ERP solutions at ProMat 2025 for manufacturers & distributors. New features will empower small to mid-sized businesses.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, the rapidly expanding cloud ERP provider, is set to present updates to its Manufacturing and Distribution Editions at ProMat 2025 in Chicago, Illinois from March 17 to 20. Revealed at the Acumatica Summit 2025, these enhancements will be part of an upcoming product release. The new features, including AI-driven tools, aim to support small to medium-sized manufacturers and distributors by offering streamlined business management solutions.

news.headline: Top universities cede to Trump's funding threats; Harvard, Yale, Columbia submit.
TGS delivers 12,536 shares to Carel Hooijkaas from 15,000 vested Restricted Share Units to cover obligations.
news.summary: Oslo, Norway – On 13 March 2025, it was reported that Carel Hooijkaas had received 12,536 shares out of the 15,000 Restricted Share Units granted to him in the "Vesting of 2023 Restricted Share Unit Award." The remaining shares' fair market value was utilized to cover withholding obligations and other deductions related to the vesting process. The shares allotted to Hooijkaas were sourced from TGS's treasury shares.

news.headline: US 4Q household net worth rises $163.6 bln.
US 30-year fixed rate mortgages 6.65$ March 13th week vs 6.63% prior week - Freddie Mac
California Pools & Landscape® hosts free Ultimate Backyard Expo in Chandler, Arizona on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Chandler, Arizona - On March 13, 2025, California Pools & Landscape (CPL), a renowned pool builder, will host a free family event offering inspiration and cost-saving opportunities for the upcoming summer swim season. The event aims to provide valuable insights and tips for both commercial and residential pool owners. Located in Arizona, CPL is a nationally recognized company known for their exceptional pool building services. Attendees can expect a fun-filled day with various activities planned, all geared towards promoting pool maintenance and maximizing enjoyment during the summer months.
